system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Heavy Melee
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You deliver a debilitating strike with the Hard Whip (Bian), cracking bone. On a success this drains one point of Hardiness for 1 round per Rank of Waijia. On a Total Success the foe is stunned for two rounds (instead of the normal 1 from the Hard Whip). Cathartic: This drains 1 point of Hardiness for 1 day per Rank of Waijia. On a Total Success, the foe is stunned for two rounds instead of one as above, but in addition, Hardiness comes back at a rate of 1 week per Rank of Waijia due to the bone being fractured.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetDrainsNote: Normal drain recovers after 1 round per Rank of Waijia. Cathartic drain recovers after 1 day per Rank of Waijia, or 1 week per Rank of Waijia on a Total Success.
system.catharticEffect: This drains 1 point of Hardiness for 1 day per Rank of Waijia. On a Total Success, the foe is stunned for two rounds instead of one as above, but in addition, Hardiness comes back at a rate of 1 week per Rank of Waijia due to the bone being fractured.
